subcodes.first_line: O Thou True Beloved! I am enraptured by Thy truth, and captivated by the beauty of Thy divine Unity, manifest in this world and upon the pages of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای معشوق حقیقتک مجذوبی و جمال حضرت احدیتک مفتونی دنیاده موجود و صفحه عالمده
subcodes.subjects: @love as fire, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @pain of love; love as veil, @spiritual transformation
